changelog: SPORTS — EPG-DRIVEN CHANNEL PICKER (the user's idea — way better than auto-mapping). Click any game card → opens a focused sheet listing every channel from YOUR Xtream EPG that's currently airing the game. Each row shows channel name + EPG programme title + start/stop times. UP/DOWN to choose, OK to tune, BACK to dismiss.
Backend caches xmltv.php once per playlist for 4h (one-time ~8 s pull, then <100 ms in-memory searches). EPG warm fires when user opens Sports so first card click is instant.
Search: programmes whose title or description contain BOTH team names within ±30 min of game start. Canadian channels sorted first.
Replaces the auto-mapping fallback that was sending users to wrong channels (Canadiens game → 'TSN 2' which actually had wrestling). EPG is the source of truth now.
If EPG has no match, sheet shows 'No matching channels in your EPG — try Live TV or contact support' and refuses to tune anywhere wrong.
